# Vhen Joseph — Wiki

> OKF v0.1 knowledge bundle for Vhen Joseph, AI Product Engineer Lead in Kuala Lumpur. Fourteen years shipping production software; builds human-centered, local-first AI agents.

## Pages
- [About](/about.md): Who Vhen is.
- [What I Believe](/beliefs.md): His take on AI-native engineering — keep craft, judgment, accountability human.
- [What I'm Building](/building.md): Candice, a self-maintaining knowledge vault, shared tooling.
- [Candice](/candice.md): Local-first personal AI with tool use, memory, and a check-with-me-first step.
- [The Path Here](/path.md): Career from J2EE to AI product engineering.
- [What I Reach For](/stack.md): Tools, focus areas, engineering foundations.
- [Say Hi](/contact.md): Contact links.
